meta.title: HELIX review: fresh-eyes audit against the governing artifacts

narration: Build cycle finished. Tests pass. Before merging, a different agent does a fresh-eyes review against the same artifacts that govern the work.

assistant: Loading bead-OAUTH-03 acceptance criteria and the artifacts it depends on.

output:
✓ implements §3.2 — refresh token rotation works
  ✓ acceptance: rejects expired refresh tokens (test 3)
  ✗ §4 revocation NOT enforced — revoked tokens still grant access
     evidence: missing revocation list check at refresh.ts:42
  ✗ no test for revocation path
  ⚠ token logged to stdout in error path (refresh.ts:71) — security leak

assistant: Two blocking findings, one warning. Filing as tracker issues:

output:
→ bead-OAUTH-03a · enforce revocation list at refresh
  → bead-OAUTH-03b · add revocation regression test
  → bead-OAUTH-03c · scrub token from error logs

narration: A second agent, looking at the same artifacts, found what the first one missed. The lever cuts both ways.
